strengthening_block: raw 137 80% Pareto-frontier byte-weighted target re-anchored 2026-04-28 post-multi-corpus-multi-chain grid: per-class winner chain identified as C2 (A1+A18 v2 AOT) for ALL 4 classes (uniform). Per-class 4/4 status: text_heavy ACHIEVED 83.43%, struct_audit ACHIEVED 87.14%, small_file BELOW 69.10% (gap 10.90pp), mixed_real BELOW 63.75% (gap 16.25pp). 2/4 80% targets ACHIEVED. 80% AGGREGATE TARGET NOT YET ACHIEVED on full corpus; gap 4.64pp REMAINING. A20 production reality (a45778db): 4/5 production HXC corpora 0% saving (eligibility gate REJECT), 1/5 synthetic 69%; A20 currently sub-claim NOT Pareto-mover on production mix. F-A20-1 DOWNGRADED to SUB_CLAIM (corpus-class-conditional like F-A19-6). Path to 80%: AOT cohort 2 (A4+A12+A15) is rank-1 priority +3-5pp. cmix-ban MAINTAINED.

disclosures.note: chains C3/C4/C5/C6/C7 from task spec REQUIRE A4/A8/A11/A12/A14/A15/A20 AOT binaries that DO NOT EXIST. INTERP path > 23s/KB (F-A18-3) makes production-scale measurement infeasible. This cycle measures C1, C2, C2v1, C8 only. Chain catalog DEFERRED to AOT cohort 2 build-out.

text_heavy + struct_audit + mixed_real samples chosen as byte-mass DOMINATORS of their classes (validated against a6d36e1d 247-file full sweep). small_file sample 5 files at 541B-8KB is LOW end of nexus 95-file class — UNREPRESENTATIVE of full nexus 605KB byte-weighted aggregate. Use anchor 69.10% for small_file projection (this cycle's sample 37.26% is HONESTLY UNREPRESENTATIVE).

C2 (A18 v2) and C2v1 (A18 v1) produce IDENTICAL output bytes on all 10 sample files (10/10 ties). A18 v2 try-and-revert wire correctly falls back to v1 when v2 wire is larger — a18_baseline AOT v1 is the operative encoder on this corpus mix. v2 wire offers algorithmic-axis gain only on Korean/multibyte rich corpus (per A18 v2 fixture-8: 1140B Korean -> 215B = 81%) which is not present in 4-class production sample.

a45778db measured A20 across 5 corpora: alm_r13 (0% gate REJECT), atlas_witness (0% gate REJECT), small_files (0% gate REJECT), mk_xi (0% gate REJECT), synthetic_repetitive (69% gate FIRES). 4/5 production corpora 0% saving — A20 IS NOT a current Pareto-mover on production HXC corpus mix. F-A20-1 DOWNGRADED to SUB_CLAIM (corpus-class-conditional).

C8 (A1+A17+A18) is STRICTLY WORSE than C2 (A1+A18) on every measured file: text_heavy 85.46% vs 90.81%, struct_audit 92.92% vs 96.78%, small_file 23.06% vs 37.26%, mixed_real 45.22% vs 66.26%. A17 PPM order-3 prepass HURTS A18 LZ-PPM order-4 by reducing match opportunities (already-entropy-coded byte stream is harder to LZ-tokenize). raw 142 D2 try-and-revert at chain level should DROP A17 stage; in this implementation A1+A17+A18 selects min(A17_alone, A17->A18, A18_alone) but A18-alone always wins on these corpora.

Sample byte-weighted aggregate 80.73% is sample-only, dominator-weighted (high-mass files inflate the average). HONEST extrapolation using per-class anchor saving rates (where sample is unrepresentative) and sample saving rates (where sample is representative) yields 75.36% projected aggregate — within measurement noise of anchor a6d36e1d 75.42%. This cycle does NOT improve anchor; it CONFIRMS anchor + identifies per-class winner chain (uniformly C2).

Verified non-collision: ace91cf6 (A18 v2 + 80% close) different axis (algorithm tuning); a7a059f0 (A20 LIVE + 80% close) different axis (A20 enable); ac86dd8a (D1 P2 forward) different axis (deploy); a18a1c7d (A9 retire + A20 priority) different axis (retire); a2c5d6b0 (A17 mem fix) different axis (stability); a0828d72 (F9 PASS 0.5) different axis (schema-id). This task = multi-corpus multi-chain GRID measurement (orthogonal to single-chain optimization).

Aggregate 75.36% projected (anchor 75.42% confirmed), 4.64pp gap. 2/4 per-class 80% targets ACHIEVED (text_heavy 83.43%, struct_audit 87.14%). small_file 69.10% + mixed_real 63.75% remain BELOW. Path to 80% requires AOT cohort 2 (A4+A12+A15 structural) +3-5pp + A20 corpus shift +0.5-2pp = +3.5-7pp combined; achievable post-AOT-cohort-2 build-out. raw 137 80% target = NOT YET ACHIEVED at 6-repo full-corpus level.

final_verdict: 4-class × 4-chain multi-corpus benchmark grid MEASURED (deferred 4-chains C3-C7 require AOT cohort 2). Per-class winner chain UNIFORMLY C2 (A1+A18 v2 AOT) — A18 LZ-PPM order-4 dominates A17 PPM order-3 + dual entropy coder. Per-class 80% status: text_heavy 90.81%/83.43% ACHIEVED, struct_audit 96.78%/87.14% ACHIEVED, small_file sample-37.26%/anchor-69.10% BELOW, mixed_real 66.26%/63.75% BELOW. Sample byte-weighted aggregate 80.73% (dominator-weighted); HONEST full-corpus projection 75.36% (within noise of anchor 75.42%). 80% TARGET NOT YET ACHIEVED on 6-repo full corpus (gap 4.64pp). A20 production reality CONFIRMED via a45778db: 4/5 production HXC corpora 0% gate REJECT (eligibility gate operational + correctness preserved + Pareto-not-mover-yet). F-A20-1 DOWNGRADED to SUB_CLAIM. Path to 80%: AOT cohort 2 (rank 1) + A20 corpus shift (rank 2) + A19 threshold tune (rank 3) — combined +3.5-7pp projected, achievable post-AOT-cohort-2 build-out.
